summary: Iteration 26 testing completed: All 13 backend API tests passed (100%), all frontend UI tests passed. Features tested: Interactive Reports page with demographic filtering, 6 chart types per chart, 4 tab sections (Demographics, Applications, Expenses, Tickets), filtered Excel export, and Udemy link.

issues: Missing `aria-describedby` warning in console for DialogContent - minor accessibility improvement (same as previous iterations)

get_interactive_data_basic.result: PASS - Returns comprehensive data with users, applications, expenses, tickets breakdowns

filter_by_division.result: PASS - Returns 261 users filtered to MIB division only

filter_by_division_and_subgroup.result: PASS - Returns users filtered to specific department

export_all_data.result: PASS - Returns Excel file with multiple sheets

divisions_list.result: PASS - 19 divisions available for filtering including MIB

departments_filtered.result: PASS - Departments filtered by selected division (Bloemfontein Operations in MIB)

reports_page_loads.result: PASS - Reports page loads with all components

udemy_link.test: Check Udemy link presence and href
udemy_link.result: PASS - Udemy link visible, points to https://www.udemy.com

filters_panel.result: PASS - Division, Department/Subgroup, Application Status, Date From, Date To selectors present

summary_cards.result: PASS - Users (387), Bursary Apps (5), Training Apps (1), Total Expenses (R 10,300.00), Tickets (7) cards visible

export_bar.result: PASS - All Data, Users, Applications, Expenses, Tickets export buttons present

chart_type_toggles.test: Click each chart type button (pie, bar, h-bar, line, area, donut)
chart_type_toggles.result: PASS - All 6 chart types work correctly on Users by Division chart

zoom_functionality.test: Click zoom button on chart card
zoom_functionality.result: PASS - Zoom dialog opens with enlarged chart

demographics_tab.result: PASS - Users by Division, Users by Department, Active vs Inactive, Users by Role charts visible

applications_tab.result: PASS - Bursary Applications by Status, Training Applications by Status, Bursary Apps by Division, Training Apps by Division charts visible

expenses_tab.result: PASS - Expenses by Type, Expenses by Division charts visible, Applicant Expense Table visible

tickets_tab.result: PASS - Tickets by Status, Tickets by Category, Tickets by Priority charts visible

division_filter.result: PASS - Selecting division updates all charts and summary cards

clear_filters.result: PASS - Filters cleared, data restored to unfiltered state

active_filter_badges.result: PASS - Active filter badges shown with X to remove

seed_data_creation: No test data created - used existing data (387 users, 5 bursary apps, 1 training app, 7 tickets, 2 applicants with expenses)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 26 interactive reports features verified working: 1) GET /api/reports/interactive-data returns comprehensive data with users, applications, expenses, tickets breakdowns, 2) Filtering by division, subgroup, status, date_from, date_to works correctly, 3) GET /api/reports/export-filtered returns Excel file with multiple sheets (Users, Bursary Applications, Training Applications, Expenses, Tickets), 4) Frontend Reports page has: Udemy link (https://www.udemy.com), 5 filter dimensions (Division, Department/Subgroup, Application Status, Date From, Date To), 5 summary cards, export bar with 5 buttons, 4 tabs (Demographics, Applications, Expenses, Tickets), 6 chart types per chart (pie, bar, h-bar, line, area, donut), zoom functionality. Data context: 387 total users, 19 divisions (MIB is largest with 261 users, 29 departments), 5 bursary apps, 1 training app, 7 tickets, 2 applicants with expenses totaling R 10,300.00.
